findings.title: Catering Commitment Missing
findings.why: Catering is crucial and uncontracted estimates are generally 10-20% lower than actual costs, potentially leading to a significant budget overrun.
findings.do: Secure a catering contract as soon as possible and update the committed costs.

findings.title: Contingency Fund Missing
findings.why: No contingency fund is set aside, making the budget vulnerable to any unforeseen expenses.
findings.do: Set aside 5-10% of the total budget as a contingency fund to cover unexpected costs.

findings.title: High Payment Concentration Pre-Wedding
findings.why: High concentration of payments are required before the wedding day for photography, venue, and music.
findings.do: Review vendor contracts and negotiate payment terms if possible to reduce pre-wedding financial concentration.
